positive: A minimalist, highly stylized circular wreath arrangement featuring a diverse botanical grouping: lush eucalyptus leaves, delicate sprigs of lavender, bold monstera tropical leaves, and small clusters of hyper-detailed berries. The arrangement should be centered and designed as a standalone decal/graphic, set against a pure white background. Style should be a blend of Japanese sumi-e ink painting techniques (for line work) and modern botanical illustration (for color realism). Composition must be highly symmetrical and balanced, emphasizing negative space for high print contrast. Use deep, saturated jewel tones (emerald green, royal purple, deep teal) contrasted with bright whites and soft grays. Perfect for high-quality screen printing on fabric. Minimalist vector art feel, high contrast, clean silhouette.
